{"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-32935", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:H/AT:N/PR:N/UI:N/VC:H/VI:N/VA:N/SC:N/SI:N/SA:N"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-208", "name": "Observable Timing Discrepancy"}], "description": "### Impact
Those using AES in CBC mode may be susceptible to a padding oracle timing attack.

### Patches
https://github.com/phpseclib/phpseclib/commit/ccc21aef71eb170e9bf819b167e67d1fd9e6e788

### Workarounds
Use AES in CTR, CFB or OFB modes
